alt_text: A woman in a black dress views her back, standing before a colorful abstract painting on an exposed brick wall with a diagonal shaft of light.
caption: the art critiqued my choices back

caption: got two entrees so my standards could have leftovers too

alt_text: A woman in an orange sweatshirt smiles at a wooden table covered in poker chips and a playing card.
caption: read every hand at the table, still can't read a text

alt_text: A woman in a white tank top takes a close-up selfie with the sun on her face, palm trees and blue sky visible behind her, holding a yellow book.
caption: skin glowing, standards still in witness protection

alt_text: A woman laughing with eyes closed while holding a pot of freshly made noodles above a glass dish already full of noodles, with another woman standing beside her in a kitchen.
caption: made noodles from scratch, still can't make a man stay

alt_text: A woman in sunglasses and a denim jacket leans over a table holding a birthday cake topped with cardboard cutout faces, surrounded by party food and balloons.
caption: put his face on the cake so i could finally cut him off

alt_text: A woman in a fur jacket and black mini skirt stands in front of a mirrored corner with digital angel wing graphics projected behind her.
caption: gave the wings the halo, kept none for myself

alt_text: A woman in an oversized white shirt and shorts stands smiling in profile in front of a large arched painting with a red-to-orange gradient, mounted on a textured concrete wall.
caption: confidence is just delusion with better lighting

alt_text: A woman rests her chin on her hand, eyes closed, smiling behind a plate of steak, grilled lemon, and slaw at an outdoor restaurant table.
caption: ordered protein for two, brought standards for zero

alt_text: A woman in a white blouse and jeans smiles while standing among large mirrored silver balloon spheres with a city skyline visible behind her.
caption: surrounded my own reflection so someone finally agreed with me

alt_text: A woman in a white oversized shirt and dark dress stands in profile against a textured concrete wall with a diagonal beam of sunlight.
caption: stood in the only light on the wall, still in the dark about him

alt_text: A woman in a black bikini and sunglasses smiles while holding a boat's mast, with an island visible in the background.
caption: held onto the mast, the only thing that's stayed hard for me

alt_text: A woman in a black top smiles at a table in an upscale restaurant, with a small gourmet dish and two wine glasses in front of her.
caption: the plate's minimalist. so is my dating life.

alt_text: A woman wearing aviation headphones and a graphic t-shirt smiles while seated in a small aircraft cabin.
caption: cleared for takeoff, standards still stuck on the tarmac

alt_text: A woman in a striped graphic t-shirt and black skirt poses with arms outstretched on a grassy helipad in front of a parked helicopter under a blue sky.
caption: chartered a helicopter, still can't rise above him

alt_text: A woman in a tan sherpa jacket sits with arms raised in a mirrored, glass-walled observation deck surrounded by large silver mirrored balloons, with a city skyline visible below.
caption: i multiplied my own reflection because he never doubled back

alt_text: A woman with long dark hair, wearing a black dress, stands at a railing overlooking a river canyon at sunset.
caption: the canyon's got more depth than my last three exes

alt_text: A woman in a black cap, sunglasses, and gray bikini smiles on a sandy beach under a tree, with the ocean and boats behind her.
caption: tree's giving more shade than any man i've dated

alt_text: A woman in a white swimsuit swims in a river near the base of a large waterfall with a rainbow visible in the mist.
caption: the rainbow showed up faster than any man i've texted

alt_text: A woman in a white bralette and brown skirt smiles while standing on rocks in front of a massive waterfall under a blue sky with clouds.
caption: a whole waterfall crying harder than i did over him

alt_text: A woman in a white bikini top and black shorts stands on rocky terrain looking back over her shoulder, with a massive waterfall and misty gorge behind her under a partly cloudy sky.
caption: looked back like he might've followed me here. he didn't.

alt_text: A woman in a white crop top, brown shorts, and sandals with a black backpack laughs while standing at a large green metal gate, with parked cars, trees, and a man walking nearby in the background.
caption: packed light. still carrying every red flag though

alt_text: A woman takes a mirror selfie in a dressing room, wearing a brown leather jacket, light blue jeans, and brown boots while holding a tote bag.
caption: i don't have a type, i have a pattern and it's concerning

alt_text: A woman leans back with her eyes closed and face tilted skyward on a boat dock, wearing a white top with a river and trees in the background.
caption: tilted my head back so the delusion could drain out

alt_text: A woman sits on a dock at sunset, laughing with her hand in her hair, looking out over the ocean with glowing lantern sculptures floating on the water.
caption: golden hour hits different when the texts don't hit at all

alt_text: A woman in sunglasses, a black cardigan, white top, and brown skirt poses leaning against a white Land Cruiser safari vehicle outside a building marked Port Health.
caption: cleared port health faster than i clear my search history

alt_text: A woman in a white shirt and jeans sits smiling on a glass observation deck ledge with the Empire State Building and Manhattan skyline behind her.
caption: taller than the empire state, my standards still can't compete with him

alt_text: A woman wearing a black cap and dark top stands in profile on a boat dock, looking out at a crocodile resting near the water's edge under a tree.
caption: the crocodile's got more patience than every man i've dated

alt_text: A woman in a tan shearling jacket takes a mirrored selfie in a glass observation deck with the Empire State Building visible in the background.
caption: multiplied myself into four reflections, still the only one showing up for me

caption: espresso's hotter than everyone i settled for this year

alt_text: A woman in a white sweatshirt and black shorts looks up at the sunset over the ocean, surrounded by other people seated on a rocky mountain overlook.
caption: the sun sets on time. my situationships never do.

alt_text: A woman in a white sweatshirt walks past a crowd watching the sunset over the ocean from a cliffside viewpoint.
caption: chasing the sun since a group of men already ghosted

caption: i can set a volleyball but not a boundary

caption: climbed a whole rock formation still can't reach my potential

caption: drove to the edge of the continent, the delusion made it too

alt_text: A woman in a white crop top and brown skirt smiles while standing on a rocky cliff overlooking the ocean.
caption: cliffside view, still checking if he's seen my story

caption: the cap did the confessing so i didn't have to

alt_text: A woman wearing a dark cap embroidered with 'i'm single' and a white tank top, smiling with one arm raised near a window.
caption: single isn't the status, it's the whole personality now

alt_text: A woman in a bikini and sunglasses puckers up near two penguins standing on a rock at Boulders Beach.
caption: blew a kiss at a penguin, best response i've gotten all year

alt_text: A woman in a bikini crouches laughing on a sandy beach near large boulders while a penguin stands nearby.
caption: penguins mate for life. i can't get a second date.

alt_text: A woman in a cow-print bucket hat and cream sweatshirt takes a mirror selfie in a hallway, wearing a dark pleated skirt and brown loafers.
caption: cow print for camouflage. the delusion is still visible.

caption: downloaded a bible app since men keep leaving me on read

caption: museum full of priceless things, still overvalued a man for free

alt_text: A woman in a black cap and white outfit leans on a railing overlooking the ocean with a city skyline in the distance.
caption: my cap says stay single, my heart already signed the lease

caption: smiling wide because the cap already told you everything

caption: the cap's the only honesty i've offered anyone this year

caption: held this latte tighter than i've held any relationship

alt_text: A smiling woman holds a black coffee cup on a rooftop balcony with the Berlin TV tower and cityscape behind her.
caption: wore a cross necklace so god knows who to blame

alt_text: A woman in a black cap, sunglasses, and white shirt over a swimsuit walks barefoot on a sandy beach near rocky tide pools and the sea.
caption: walked barefoot into the ocean since no man's worth wading for

caption: promoted twice this year, still can't get promoted to girlfriend

caption: turned around faster for the camera than i ever did for closure

caption: brought a laptop so my delusion could bill hours

caption: the man paddling has more direction than every man i've dated

caption: i don't ghost, i just develop sudden amnesia

caption: three screens, one glass of water, zero signs of a healed woman

caption: the cap's the only one that got straight to the point

caption: he's got a cigarette hanging off his lip and still more commitment than my ex

alt_text: A man wearing a gray baseball cap embroidered with 'i'm single' smiles while looking down, surrounded by a group of people outdoors.
caption: he wore my cap and got more matches than i ever did

caption: borrowed my cap, still hasn't borrowed a personality

caption: wore a helmet because my judgment's the real hazard

caption: promoted myself to ceo of overthinking his silence

caption: tried on a whole dressing room, still can't try on happiness

caption: stuck between floor 23 and giving him one more chance

caption: chasing tram number 10 since no man ever stays on track

caption: no makeup, no boyfriend, no notes

caption: matching earmuffs, mismatched taste in men

caption: the kitten's playing dead, still more effort than my ex put in

caption: drinking imported beer since local men wouldn't commit either

caption: closed my eyes so the matcha could lie to me too

caption: drinking matcha so at least something's green in my life

caption: tightening my belt since my standards are already loose

caption: two flavors in one cup. still can't find one consistent man.

caption: sunscreen on the shoulder, red flags left untreated

caption: sailed past three islands, still haven't found one good man

caption: moved to international waters so my situationship couldn't follow

caption: the kitten's got more range than every man i've swiped on

caption: booked the villa alone because no man's ever stayed this long

caption: upgraded the view, downgraded my expectations of him showing up

caption: walked toward the ocean like it might commit back

caption: the fountains reach four stories, my situationships max out at one text

caption: cape town's got more altitude than my standards ever reached

caption: came all the way to the edge of africa to peak myself, not the view

caption: dressed for a garden party, standards still stuck in the dirt road

caption: i don't chase men anymore, i just relocate my delusion

caption: eyes closed so the popsicle can't see me settling

caption: biting the sandwich like it texted back first

caption: lit a sparkler since no man's ever stayed this bright for me

caption: kiss face on standby, no man to spend it on

caption: airpods on so his voice memos can't reach me

caption: the dog's the only situation i've committed to this year

caption: holding the cat like it owes me child support

caption: pointed at the tower so he'd think i had direction

caption: the train's on schedule, my love life's still delayed indefinitely

caption: stone guardians on both sides, still let the wrong ones past security

caption: the rapids move faster than he ever did for me

caption: my arm's got more reach than my situationships ever did

caption: i climbed a mountain, my standards stayed at sea level

caption: came to look down on the city, ended up looking down on him instead

caption: the ocean's calm. my situationship never was.

caption: tied every knot on this boat, still can't tie him down

caption: boat's steady. my dating life's still capsized.

caption: sipping this coconut like it owes me an apology

caption: replying to emails faster than he ever texted back

caption: the cigarette's the only thing i've been loyal to all year

caption: the cap said single, the ring said otherwise

caption: the dog looked back at me like he heard my ex's voicemail

caption: i order enough dumplings so my standards can eat too

caption: graduated top of my class in picking the wrong ones

caption: i season everything except my standards

caption: this dog gives more eye contact than my situationship ever did
